changes.newValue: Draft Story Arc 2 chapter outlines for one character (chapters 6–10)

changes.oldValue: Pick one of the 4 characters and outline their second arc. 5 chapters (6–10). Per chapter: a 2–3 sentence scene summary, the core choice or tension, and the emotional beat. This becomes the brief for writing the full arc. ~2–3h. Don't write full dialogue — just beats and intent.
changes.newValue: Pick one of the 4 characters and outline their second arc. 5 chapters (6–10). Per chapter: a 2–3 sentence scene summary, the core choice or tension, and what the character is feeling or deciding. This becomes the brief for writing the full arc. ~2–3h. Don't write full dialogue — just the skeleton.
